name: Orange Pecan Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Add the egg and beat well. Incorporate the grated orange rind, orange juice, and sifted dry ingredients (flour and baking soda). Mix until combined.
3. Shape the dough into a roll or several smaller rolls. Wrap in waxed paper and refrigerate for several hours, or overnight.
4. Once chilled, cut the rolls into thin slices using a sharp knife. Place the slices on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 8 to 10 minutes. Makes about 4 dozen cookies. Helen Jolly
